Tool execution results:
[{"tool": "note-lark_notes_create", "input": {"payload": {"title": "Service Layer Testing", "type": "skill", "scope": "global", "description": "Test service-layer behavior with focused fixtures", "skill_level": "intermediate", "triggers": ["service test", "fixture strategy", "unit isolation"], "aliases": ["service-testing-playbook", "fixture-guide"], "required_tools": ["pytest"], "content": "# Service Layer Testing

## Overview
Test service-layer behavior with focused fixtures.

## Strategy

When testing service layers, focus on:
- Isolating business logic
- Using minimal, focused fixtures
- Avoiding over-engineering test data

## Best Practices

1. Create fixtures for only the data needed for the specific test
2. Test business logic independently of dependencies
3. Use mocking for external service calls
4. Keep tests fast and focused

## Example

```python
@pytest.fixture
def user_service(db):
    return UserService(db)

@pytest.fixture
def sample_user(user_service):
    return user_service.create_user(
        name="Test User",
        email="test@example.com"
    )

def test_user_creation(user_service, sample_user):
    assert sample_user.email == "test@example.com"
```

## Required Tools
- pytest

payload.title: Service Layer Testing
payload.description: Test service-layer behavior with focused fixtures
payload.content:
# Service Layer Testing

## Overview
Test service-layer behavior with focused fixtures.

## Strategy

When testing service layers, focus on:
- Isolating business logic
- Using minimal, focused fixtures
- Avoiding over-engineering test data

## Best Practices

1. Create fixtures for only the data needed for the specific test
2. Test business logic independently of dependencies
3. Use mocking for external service calls
4. Keep tests fast and focused

## Example

```python
@pytest.fixture
def user_service(db):
    return UserService(db)

@pytest.fixture
def sample_user(user_service):
    return user_service.create_user(
        name="Test User",
        email="test@example.com"
    )

def test_user_creation(user_service, sample_user):
    assert sample_user.email == "test@example.com"
```

## Required Tools
- pytest
